process.subtitle: Steps
process.title: Process of

step1.title: Choose a Package
step1.description: Browse our candle package collection, find the perfect package for your occasion.

step2.title: Contact Us
step2.description: Our consultant team is ready to help you with the ordering process or any questions.

step3.title: Receive Your Candles
step3.description: Receive the package and enjoy your candles. We handle all our orders with respect.

process.note: If you've never ordered a package before, we'll guide you through the process.

product1.title: Candle Making Kit
product1.description: Complete kit with all tools and materials needed to make your own candles.

product2.title: Scented Candles
product2.description: A variety of scented candles in different fragrances and sizes.

product3.title: Custom Packages
product3.description: Personalized candle packages tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

product4.title: Essential Oil Set
product4.description: High-quality essential oils for candle making and aromatherapy.

product5.title: Wick Assortment
product5.description: Various types of wicks for different candle sizes and types.

product6.title: Candle Containers
product6.description: Beautiful containers and jars for your handmade candles.

slider.text1: Handmade candle kits for every style
slider.text3: Every candle tells a story of light & scent
slider.text4: Starter to pro candle making bundles
